tests.prompt: Use the nemo-customizer skill to fine-tune Qwen with automodel.
Run nemo-customizer. I need to submit an automodel SFT LoRA job on NeMo Platform.
Invoke nemo customization via the customizer skill and walk me through filesets and model entity setup.
Fine-tune a model with LoRA SFT via nemo customization and a qwen3 Hugging Face weights fileset.
Help me run SFT LoRA training with nemo customization automodel.
Train a small chat model on a dataset I have locally and register the output on the platform.
Use nemo customization unsloth submit to do a LoRA SFT as a Docker GPU job on the platform.
Help me submit an unsloth fine-tune job via nemo customization with 4-bit LoRA.
Fine-tune Qwen3-1.7B with Unsloth on NeMo Platform — I want the Unsloth training driver and bitsandbytes 4-bit loading.
I want a quick LoRA adapter on Qwen with Unsloth's optimizer defaults, single GPU container job.
NeMo Platform is running. Before any customization training, help me explore what my support agent should do.
I uploaded train.jsonl for fun. Mostly I want nemo-build-agent to deploy my LangGraph NAT workflow from the spec.
Jobs controller is up. Next I need nemo-status and evaluator benchmarks, not model weight training.
Use nemo-build-agent to scaffold and deploy my agent from agents/calculator.spec.md.
Run safe-synthesizer on my CSV for tabular synthetic data generation.
Attach guardrails middleware to my virtual model in the inference gateway.
